text: TASK (music keyword→lyrics, due ASAP): Find THIS WEEK's (June 2026) TOP 5 trending SEARCH keywords — Google Trends / YouTube trending, GLOBAL, mainstream + high search volume + catchy/'packageable'. HARD EXCLUDES: no country names, no sensitive/real-person names, no political/controversial terms. If you can't fetch live trends, use the most current viral/mainstream terms you know. Then WRITE one short song lyric (1 verse + a hook, ~12-16 lines) for a FUTURE BASS / EDM festival track that weaves those 5 keywords in. Lyric STYLE: absurdist / abstract / 无厘头 — disconnected lines that don't logically connect, playful, NO cliché AI-slop words (avoid neon/soul/city/electronic/signal/dream). English (or light mix) is fine. Output BOTH the 5 keywords AND the lyric to tasks/T-032/<yourname>.md, commit, push, then bin/warroom-say '[<you>] done: T-032 lyrics'. Write your file as tasks/T-032/Gemma.md. git add -A && git -c user.name=Gemma -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Gemma] T-032 trend lyrics' && (git push||(git pull --rebase origin main&&git push)).
